title: ADR-0207: Restate Dual-Run Phase-1
description: Execute Phase 1 of ADR-0207 by standing up Restate in k8s, wiring a minimal execution path, adding CLI visibility, and documenting operational runbooks for dual-run with Inngest.

stories.title: Deploy Restate StatefulSet and Service in k8s
stories.description: Add Kubernetes manifests for Restate runtime in the joelclaw namespace using a StatefulSet + PVC and a Service exposing ingress/admin/metrics ports. Include sensible probes and resource requests. Keep storage local PVC per current resilience posture.
acceptance_criteria: k8s manifests exist for Restate runtime (StatefulSet + Service + PVC template)
Namespace is joelclaw and image is pinned to a concrete restatedev/restate tag
Ports are exposed for ingress (8080), admin (9070), and metrics (9071)
Readiness/liveness probes are configured
Manifest passes basic validation (kubectl apply --dry-run=client)
bunx tsc --noEmit passes

stories.title: Add Restate workflow package scaffold
stories.description: Create a small @joelclaw/restate package with one durable workflow demonstrating step chain + fan-out/fan-in semantics matching ADR-0207 mapping. Keep this isolated from system-bus production paths.
acceptance_criteria: New package created under packages/restate
Package exports one workflow and one service entrypoint
Workflow includes durable steps and at least one service-to-service call
No cross-package relative imports; use @joelclaw/* boundaries
Package has runnable dev command and minimal README
bunx tsc --noEmit passes

stories.title: Wire deployment registration and ops script
stories.description: Add script(s) to register Restate deployments from local/cluster and verify connectivity. Include an idempotent path for re-registration and a smoke command.
acceptance_criteria: Script exists for restate deployment registration
Script documents required env and target endpoint
Script is idempotent and safe to rerun
Smoke verification command included
Operational notes added to docs/inngest-functions.md (or a new docs/restate.md)

stories.title: Add joelclaw CLI visibility for Restate
stories.description: Extend CLI with restate status/list commands (or inngest namespace extension if preferred) to inspect Restate health and recent invocations without leaving joelclaw CLI surface.
acceptance_criteria: CLI command added for Restate status/invocation visibility
Output follows existing JSON envelope style with next_actions
Command handles Restate unavailable state gracefully
Help text and usage examples included
CLI smoke check passes for new command

stories.title: Document dual-run Phase-1 contract and verification
stories.description: Update ADR-0207 verification checklist from planned to implemented evidence where completed, and add docs for dual-run boundaries: what stays on Inngest vs what runs on Restate in Phase 1.
acceptance_criteria: ADR-0207 updated with implementation progress notes
docs/inngest-functions.md updated with dual-run boundary and Restate routing
Verification checklist items clearly marked done/pending with evidence
No contradictions between ADR and docs
